title: Voice AI Agent vs IVR: Why Conversational AI is the Future of Customer Support
content:
![Image description](https://dev-to-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/articles/65bhbctfqnnvsa1ub0by.jpeg)

Customer support is a key driver of customer experience, loyalty and brand perception. Today’s customers expect fast, human-like conversations, not rigid menus or long hold times. As expectations rise, businesses are rethinking how they engage customers over voice channels.

This shift has brought a critical comparison into focus: Voice [AI Agent](https://exei.ai/blog/voice-ai-agent-vs-ivr/) vs IVR. While IVR systems have served businesses for decades, conversational Voice AI is redefining what modern customer support looks like.

[Read full blog...](https://exei.ai/blog/voice-ai-agent-vs-ivr/)
